substep.title: Dispatch Second Validator Pass for Cross-Check

invoke-agent.name: codesmith-validator
invoke-agent.prompt:
Cross-check the assessment of PR #{{pr_number}} threads.
Input: {{bundle_dir}}/pr-cycle-assessment-iter-{{iteration_count}}.json
For each Address / Decline / Defer decision, verify: - Did the first assessment actually read the code (evidence required: file:line citation)? - Is the recommendation reasonable given the codebase reality? - Are there obvious errors in judgment?
Output verdict: - APPROVED: All decisions reasonable, evidence sufficient. - REJECTED: One or more decisions need re-assessment. List which threads + why.
If REJECTED, the orchestrator will re-dispatch step 4 with the cross-check feedback.

check.action: Increment {{rejection_count}}. If rejection_count > 3, exit with ERROR report (validator cannot agree with itself — escalate to human). Otherwise, return to step 4 with the cross-check feedback added to the validator prompt.
